summary: Completed frontend testing for P0 bug fixes: Greek language support and duplicate filters removal. All tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Greek (el) language route correctly added to App.js line 76
Greek translations properly added to AppContext.js lines 320-404
Age verification modal correctly displays Greek text when on /el route
Partners page no longer has duplicate quick filters in header - only sidebar filters exist on desktop
Mobile filter drawer working correctly with Sheet component
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bugs fixed and verified: 1) Greek language (/el route) now works with proper translations in navigation, age verification modal, and language selector. 2) Partners page no longer has duplicate quick filters - filters only exist in sidebar on desktop and in mobile drawer on mobile.

features_tested.greek_language_route: PASS - /el route loads without 404, navigation shows Greek text (Συνοδοί, Σχετικά, Επικοινωνία)
features_tested.greek_age_verification: PASS - Modal displays Greek text (Επαλήθευση Ηλικίας, Νομική Προειδοποίηση, Είμαι 18+, Έξοδος)
features_tested.partners_page_no_duplicate_filters: PASS - No quick filter buttons in header, only sidebar filters on desktop
features_tested.sort_dropdown: PASS - Works correctly with options (Önerilen, En Yeni, En Popüler, Öne Çıkanlar)
features_tested.language_switching_all_5: PASS - TR, EN, RU, DE, EL all work without 404
features_tested.language_selector_dropdown: PASS - All 5 languages available (Türkçe, English, Русский, Deutsch, Ελληνικά)
features_tested.mobile_filter_drawer: PASS - Opens correctly with all filter options

bugs_verified_fixed.verification: No quick filter buttons (Kadın, Erkek, Trans) in header area, only sidebar filters exist
/el route works, navigation shows Greek text, age verification modal shows Greek text
